TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sedi'k Ť≥ĹŚĺ∑ŚÖčśóŹ kakiliman Sedi'k "kamu nu heni Seediq" u taywan nu Yuncumin a binnacadan nu cacay, malakalak i nantu zenay a kitidaan. Ť≥ĹŚĺ∑ŚÖčśóŹ(Ť≥ĹŚĺ∑ŚÖčŤ™ě:Seediq), . nilaculan capi nu binacadan misuwanispalamel han kuheni tu tayan a masacapaay, nu pinaay tu kumihcaan siheci ku nipangangan nu heni, i 2008 a mihcaan 4 abylad 23 a demiad mala kahulaman nu siyhu palutatenga tu taywan yuncumin a binacadan.u tademaw makaala tu lakiwit tu cacay a emang ku tademaw nu heni. nu ayawan nu cincaw a naemwkan maadih ku nikilukuan tinabinacadan, yu kadipunan sa u mikingkiway tu nutademaw makaadih tu sidi'k atu tayan i kamu nu cay kalecad, nika intusaay a bunacadan idaw ku pikulit tu bihid, atu militangah a lalangawan, kyu palamel han tu dikuday; u sidi'k atu taluku abinacadan idaw ku mapulungay a nikalingatuan atu lalangawan,nika caay kalecad ku kakitidaan atu taluku a tademaw nu udip a palutatenga kyu malaliyas. daduducanśóŹÁĺ§ś≤ŅťĚ© matabal u yuncumin inayay ku "cu" hanany a kamu, namakayni I dipun a tawya, idaku naemekan nu kilukuan u Seediq han u "saci abinacadan" sasatinakuan sa maluyaluyay miyudu' tu "tademaw" "seejiq" han pangiha. Nayi nantu kueneng, pasu tulu ku kamu nuheni a bunacadan, Teluku "Seejiq Truku" dumasa "tayluke luyalul " "Taroko"at utu-lu-ku a luyalul "Truku tekutaya "Seediq Tgdaya ungnaga u teketaya a luyalul "Takadaya atu tuta "Seediq Toda",u ngangan sa tuta maluyaluyay "Tuuda". seejiq "šļļ"(seejiq) (Seejiq Truku)ŚŹąÁ®Ī"Ś§™ť≠ĮťĖ£Áĺ§"(Taroko)śąĖ"śČėśīõŚļęÁĺ§"(Truku),Śĺ∑ŚÖčťĀĒťõÖ(Seediq Tgdaya),šļ¶Á®ĪÁāļŚĺ∑ŚÖčťĀĒťõÖÁĺ§(Takadaya)šĽ•ŚŹäťÉĹťĀĒ(Seediq Toda)šĻüÁ®ĪÁāļťÉĹťĀĒÁĺ§(Tuuda). tulu lasubu a mihcaan, duma a binacadan maisid tada i aydaay nu kalingku a kitidaan, pacakar tu nuudip a lalangawan, mapatenged nu heni tu akamu. ina binacadan matenes masasu pain isa, u katinengan tu binacadan nu palutatengaay tu, milunguc a pangangan tu tayluke, i 2004 amihcaan 1 abulad 4 a demiad mal kahulaman palutatenga, tatengaay tu a taywan yuncumincu namaka tayan tahekal malamasacacayay a binacadan. Taywan yu kadipunan henay u busiya a kawaw, u sidi'k ku misuayaway tu dipun i tawya u talakaway cay kanamuh kyu masasuada kyu masasulaup mabakuhac. 2003 a mihcaan 9 ay abulad 23 a demiad u waliay tipanay a binacadan pakayni pangangan idaw ku cay kalecad nu duma, tipanay a binacadan patucek tu sidi'k abinacadan u waliay a binacadan sa patuce tu taluku abinacadan, nu nantu a zenay a binacadan Seejiq Truku,Seediq Tgdaya,Seediq Toda angangan nu binacadan patucek hantu nu mucuduhay i pu-li a-pu-lu a siwkudu a patideng. 2003ŚĻī9śúą23śó•,ÁĒĪśĖľśĚĪ, Seejiq Truku,Seediq Tgdaya,Seediq Toda . Mutudu' tu tuluay a maluyaluyay a binacadan, milihidaay a sipunu'ay nu sasakamuen sa, pulung satu patucek nu dipun a nusulitan kilukuwan a ngangan nu binacadan ku kakilulan. Milunguc tu siyhu atu waliay a sidi'k a tademaw a patucek pangangan tu "taluku binacadan". 2004 a mihcaan 1 abulah 14 a demiad, waliay a sidi'k atademaw "taluku a binacadan"u ngangan nu binacadan tatengaay sa siheci tu, namakayni i talakaway patucek tu taywan sabaw tusa a binacadan , muawaw tu tipanay a sidi'k a binacadan mapulung milabu a micumud tu taluku a binacadan. U ngangan nu binacadan atu katinengan nu binacadan idaw ku cayay kalecad, maydih palutatenga tu binacadan metalaw malawpes, kyu pasayni i" sidi'k" masacacay a pangangan. .
S.PHON: s…ôdi Ē~ °k **** kakir~…ĺiman s…ôdi Ē~ °k "kamu nu ńß…ôni s…ô…ôdi*" u tajwan nu jun ¶umin a binna ¶adan nu ¶a ¶aj, mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i nantu z…ônaj a kitidaan. ****(****:s…ô…ôdi*), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶api nu bina ¶adan misuwanispar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ńßan kuńß…ôni tu tajan a masa ¶apaaj, nu pinaaj tu kumińß ¶aan sińß…ô ¶i ku nipaŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ôni, i **** a mińß ¶aan * abjr~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺa kańßur~…ĺaman nu sijńßu par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu tajwan jun ¶umin a bina ¶adan.u tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺakiwit tu ¶a ¶aj a …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw nu ńß…ôni. nu ajawan nu ¶in ¶aw a na…ômwkan maadińß ku nikir~…ĺukuan tinabina ¶adan, ju kadipunan sa u mikiŇčkiwaj tu nutad…ômaw makaadińß tu sidi Ē~ °k atu tajan i kamu nu ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, nika intusaaj a buna ¶adan idaw ku pikur~…ĺit tu bińßid, atu mir~…ĺitaŇčańß a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, kju par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ńßan tu dikudaj; u sidi Ē~ °k atu tar~…ĺuku abina ¶adan idaw ku mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a nikar~…ĺiŇčatuan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan,nika ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kakitidaan atu tar~…ĺuku a tad…ômaw nu udip a par~…ĺutat…ôŇča kju mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas. dadudu ¶an**** matabar~…ĺ u jun ¶umin inajaj ku " ¶u" ńßananj a kamu, namakajni i dipun a tawja, idaku na…ôm…ôkan nu kir~…ĺukuan u s…ô…ôdi* ńßan u "sa ¶i abina ¶adan" sasatinakuan sa mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj mijudu Ē~ ° tu "tad…ômaw" "s…ô…ôji*" ńßan paŇčińßa. naji nantu ku…ôn…ôŇč, pasu tur~…ĺu ku kamu nuńß…ôni a buna ¶adan, t…ôr~…ĺuku "s…ô…ôji* truku" dumasa "tajr~…ĺuk…ô r~…ĺujar~…ĺur~…ĺ " "taroko"at utu-r~…ĺu-ku a r~…ĺujar~…ĺur~…ĺ "truku t…ôkutaja "s…ô…ôdi* tgdaja uŇčnaga u t…ôk…ôtaja a r~…ĺujar~…ĺur~…ĺ "takadaja atu tuta "s…ô…ôdi* toda",u ŇčaŇčan sa tuta mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj "tuuda". s…ô…ôji* "*"(s…ô…ôji*) (s…ô…ôji* truku)**"****"(taroko)*"****"(truku),****(s…ô…ôdi* tgdaja),********(takadaja)****(s…ô…ôdi* toda)******(tuuda). tur~…ĺu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, duma a bina ¶adan maisid tada i ajdaaj nu kar~…ĺiŇčku a kitidaan, pa ¶akar tu nuudip a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mapat…ôŇč…ôd nu ńß…ôni tu akamu. ina bina ¶adan mat…ôn…ôs masasu pain isa, u katin…ôŇčan tu bina ¶adan nu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaaj tu, mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ a paŇčaŇčan tu tajr~…ĺuk…ô, i **** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺ kańßur~…ĺaman par~…ĺutat…ôŇča, tat…ôŇčaaj tu a tajwan jun ¶umin ¶u namaka tajan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ mar~…ĺamasa ¶a ¶ajaj a bina ¶adan. tajwan ju kadipunan ńß…ônaj u busija a kawaw, u sidi Ē~ °k ku misuajawaj tu dipun i tawja u tar~…ĺakawaj ¶aj kanamuńß kju masasuada kju masasur~…ĺaup mabakuńßa ¶. **** a mińß ¶aan * aj abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad u war~…ĺiaj tipanaj a bina ¶adan pakajni paŇčaŇčan idaw ku ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu duma, tipanaj a bina ¶adan patu ¶…ôk tu sidi Ē~ °k abina ¶adan u war~…ĺiaj a bina ¶adan sa patu ¶…ô tu tar~…ĺuku abina ¶adan, nu nantu a z…ônaj a bina ¶adan s…ô…ôji* truku,s…ô…ôdi* tgdaja,s…ô…ôdi* toda aŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan patu ¶…ôk ńßantu nu mu ¶uduńßaj i pu-r~…ĺi a-pu-r~…ĺu a siwkudu a patid…ôŇč. **********,***, s…ô…ôji* truku,s…ô…ôdi* tgdaja,s…ô…ôdi* toda . mutudu Ē~ ° tu tur~…ĺuaj a mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj a bina ¶adan, mir~…ĺińßidaaj a sipunu Ē~ °aj nu sasakamu…ôn sa, pur~…ĺuŇč satu patu ¶…ôk nu dipun a nusur~…ĺitan kir~…ĺukuwan a ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan ku kakir~…ĺur~…ĺan. mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu sijńßu atu war~…ĺiaj a sidi Ē~ °k a tad…ômaw a patu ¶…ôk paŇčaŇčan tu "tar~…ĺuku bina ¶adan". **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺańß ** a d…ômiad, war~…ĺiaj a sidi Ē~ °k atad…ômaw "tar~…ĺuku a bina ¶adan"u ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan tat…ôŇčaaj sa sińß…ô ¶i tu, namakajni i tar~…ĺakawaj patu ¶…ôk tu tajwan sabaw tusa a bina ¶adan , muawaw tu tipanaj a sidi Ē~ °k a bina ¶adan mapur~…ĺuŇč mir~…ĺabu a mi ¶umud tu tar~…ĺuku a bina ¶adan. u ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan atu katin…ôŇčan nu bina ¶adan idaw ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, majdińß par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu bina ¶adan m…ôtar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺawp…ôs, kju pasajni i" sidi Ē~ °k" masa ¶a ¶aj a paŇčaŇčan. .
S.FORM: Sedi'k Ť≥ĹŚĺ∑ŚÖčśóŹ kakiliman Sedi'k "kamu nu heni Seediq" u taywan nu Yuncumin a binnacadan nu cacay, malakalak i nantu zenay a kitidaan. Ť≥ĹŚĺ∑ŚÖčśóŹ(Ť≥ĹŚĺ∑ŚÖčŤ™ě:Seediq), . nilaculan capi nu binacadan misuwanispalamel han kuheni tu tayan a masacapaay, nu pinaay tu kumihcaan siheci ku nipangangan nu heni, i 2008 a mihcaan 4 abylad 23 a demiad mala kahulaman nu siyhu palutatenga tu taywan yuncumin a binacadan.u tademaw makaala tu lakiwit tu cacay a emang ku tademaw nu heni. nu ayawan nu cincaw a naemwkan maadih ku nikilukuan tinabinacadan, yu kadipunan sa u mikingkiway tu nutademaw makaadih tu sidi'k atu tayan i kamu nu cay kalecad, nika intusaay a bunacadan idaw ku pikulit tu bihid, atu militangah a lalangawan, kyu palamel han tu dikuday; u sidi'k atu taluku abinacadan idaw ku mapulungay a nikalingatuan atu lalangawan,nika caay kalecad ku kakitidaan atu taluku a tademaw nu udip a palutatenga kyu malaliyas. daduducanśóŹÁĺ§ś≤ŅťĚ© matabal u yuncumin inayay ku "cu" hanany a kamu, namakayni I dipun a tawya, idaku naemekan nu kilukuan u Seediq han u "saci abinacadan" sasatinakuan sa maluyaluyay miyudu' tu "tademaw" "seejiq" han pangiha. Nayi nantu kueneng, pasu tulu ku kamu nuheni a bunacadan, Teluku "Seejiq Truku" dumasa "tayluke luyalul " "Taroko"at utu-lu-ku a luyalul "Truku tekutaya "Seediq Tgdaya ungnaga u teketaya a luyalul "Takadaya atu tuta "Seediq Toda",u ngangan sa tuta maluyaluyay "Tuuda". seejiq "šļļ"(seejiq) (Seejiq Truku)ŚŹąÁ®Ī"Ś§™ť≠ĮťĖ£Áĺ§"(Taroko)śąĖ"śČėśīõŚļęÁĺ§"(Truku),Śĺ∑ŚÖčťĀĒťõÖ(Seediq Tgdaya),šļ¶Á®ĪÁāļŚĺ∑ŚÖčťĀĒťõÖÁĺ§(Takadaya)šĽ•ŚŹäťÉĹťĀĒ(Seediq Toda)šĻüÁ®ĪÁāļťÉĹťĀĒÁĺ§(Tuuda). tulu lasubu a mihcaan, duma a binacadan maisid tada i aydaay nu kalingku a kitidaan, pacakar tu nuudip a lalangawan, mapatenged nu heni tu akamu. ina binacadan matenes masasu pain isa, u katinengan tu binacadan nu palutatengaay tu, milunguc a pangangan tu tayluke, i 2004 amihcaan 1 abulad 4 a demiad mal kahulaman palutatenga, tatengaay tu a taywan yuncumincu namaka tayan tahekal malamasacacayay a binacadan. Taywan yu kadipunan henay u busiya a kawaw, u sidi'k ku misuayaway tu dipun i tawya u talakaway cay kanamuh kyu masasuada kyu masasulaup mabakuhac. 2003 a mihcaan 9 ay abulad 23 a demiad u waliay tipanay a binacadan pakayni pangangan idaw ku cay kalecad nu duma, tipanay a binacadan patucek tu sidi'k abinacadan u waliay a binacadan sa patuce tu taluku abinacadan, nu nantu a zenay a binacadan Seejiq Truku,Seediq Tgdaya,Seediq Toda angangan nu binacadan patucek hantu nu mucuduhay i pu-li a-pu-lu a siwkudu a patideng. 2003ŚĻī9śúą23śó•,ÁĒĪśĖľśĚĪ, Seejiq Truku,Seediq Tgdaya,Seediq Toda . Mutudu' tu tuluay a maluyaluyay a binacadan, milihidaay a sipunu'ay nu sasakamuen sa, pulung satu patucek nu dipun a nusulitan kilukuwan a ngangan nu binacadan ku kakilulan. Milunguc tu siyhu atu waliay a sidi'k a tademaw a patucek pangangan tu "taluku binacadan". 2004 a mihcaan 1 abulah 14 a demiad, waliay a sidi'k atademaw "taluku a binacadan"u ngangan nu binacadan tatengaay sa siheci tu, namakayni i talakaway patucek tu taywan sabaw tusa a binacadan , muawaw tu tipanay a sidi'k a binacadan mapulung milabu a micumud tu taluku a binacadan. U ngangan nu binacadan atu katinengan nu binacadan idaw ku cayay kalecad, maydih palutatenga tu binacadan metalaw malawpes, kyu pasayni i" sidi'k" masacacay a pangangan. .

¶ur~…ĺan ¶api nu bina ¶adan misuwanispar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ńßan kuńß…ôni tu tajan a masa ¶apaaj, nu pinaaj tu kumińß ¶aan sińß…ô ¶i ku nipaŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ôni, i **** a mińß ¶aan * abjr~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad toda)******(tuuda). tur~…ĺu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, duma a bina ¶adan maisid tada i ajdaaj nu kar~…ĺiŇčku a kitidaan, pa ¶akar tu nuudip a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mapat…ôŇč…ôd nu ńß…ôni tu akamu. ina bina mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj a bina ¶adan, mir~…ĺińßidaaj a sipunu Ē~ °aj nu sasakamu…ôn sa, pur~…ĺuŇč satu patu ¶…ôk nu dipun a nusur~…ĺitan kir~…ĺukuwan a ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan ku kakir~…ĺur~…ĺan. mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tar~…ĺuku a bina ¶adan. u ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan atu katin…ôŇčan nu bina ¶adan idaw ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, majdińß par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu bina ¶adan m…ôtar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺawp…ôs, kju pasajni i" sidi Ē~ °k" masa ¶a ¶aj a paŇčaŇčan. .
